---
title: Pronouns
description: How to use pronouns clearly in technical documentation
---

## General guidance

Use pronouns to make your writing less repetitive, but make sure the reference is clear.

### Second person (you)

Address the reader directly with "you" and "your." This creates a conversational, friendly tone.

- **Do:** You can customize the settings.
- **Don't:** Users can customize the settings.

### Gender-neutral language

Use "they/them/their" as singular pronouns when referring to a person whose gender is unknown.

- **Do:** When a user signs in, they see the dashboard.
- **Don't:** When a user signs in, he or she sees the dashboard.
